[textmode.js](../../../../../index.md) / [layering](../../../index.md) / [TextmodeLayer](../../TextmodeLayer.md) / getPluginState

# Method: getPluginState()

```ts
getPluginState<T>(pluginName): T | undefined;
```

Retrieve plugin-specific state stored on this layer.

## Type Parameters

| Type Parameter |
| ------ |
| `T` |

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
| ------ | ------ | ------ |
| `pluginName` | `string` | Plugin identifier. |

## Returns

`T` \| `undefined`

Stored state, or `undefined` when not set.
